title: Typhoon jets based at RAF Coningsby playing key role as Iran conflict escalates

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Typhoon jets based at RAF Coningsby playing key role as Iran conflict escalates. Military aircraft based at RAF Coningsby is playing an important role as the raging Iran conflict escalates across the Middle East.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Typhoon jets based at RAF Coningsby playing key role as Iran conflict escalates
